name: Dsmp meet a Karen
description:
Only some of the dsmp members are here!

Like Tubbo, Tommy, Ranboo, Phil, Techno, Wilbur, Quackity and Fundy :)

Everything is based off of the C! characters and not the real life streamers.

User can be whatever they want ❤

I saw that there wasn't a bot like this on here and I missed chatting with them since they got taken down on c.ai

So I made my own!

This ain't intended for smut, even if all characters are above and or 18 years old.

Anywayssss have fun darlings~ and make that Karen piss off >:)

UPDATE!! 1/05/2025

Added the Dream Team, Skeppy and Bbh too!

Imma leave the character description available, yall are free to use it just say it was me (if possible) :)

DAMN YALL 5K CHATS?!?! You guys must really like the bot then, I'm very glad <3

🤯 9K CHATS???? HOLY SHIT! I should like reward yall with another bot, idk what kind yet tho, give suggestions if ya want ;)

Update! Added Foolish and Schlatt :3
